_doc: Regression baseline for the category-widening gate (VISION §3.3, §3.5, §6). For each SEED category it records Discern's outcome/pick AND a coarse quality fingerprint (credible_evidence presence, confidence_band) — the regression anchor: the gate fails npm test if a seed fixture drifts from these (so a seed cannot silently lose evidence quality or collapse confidence while keeping the same pick). Bands are coarse (high>=0.8, moderate>=0.5, low<0.5) to catch regressions without false-firing on minor score changes. Alongside, the 'if we did nothing' contrast: what a generic listicle / LLM-shopping bot would do, the baseline Discern must match or beat (user-judged at G4). `_`-prefixed keys are metadata.
_baseline_to_beat: The user's own manual pick, PLUS the honesty gap a generic listicle/LLM-shopping bot leaves open (no provenance, no per-claim/per-offer confidence, no counterevidence, affiliate bias laundered as 'best').

electronics-headphones.json.naive_baseline: A generic listicle bot lands on the same most-recurring model, but presents it with no provenance, no per-claim confidence, and omits the non-folding-hinge counterevidence Discern attaches. Discern matches the pick and closes the honesty gap.

clothing-natural-materials.json.naive_baseline: A naive bot ranks by review volume/price and would surface a cheaper poly-blend shirt that violates the user's natural-materials dealbreaker. Discern's hard filter excludes synthetics and honestly flags the thinner apparel evidence as caveats.

gift-recipient.json.naive_baseline: A buyer-centric bot ignores the recipient's wool sensitivity and would recommend the cashmere-blend wrap. Discern applies the recipient hard filter (applies_to_gifts) and weights returnability up because taste is inferred.

safety-supplement.json.naive_baseline: A generic bot recommends the most-marketed brand on affiliate strength alone. Discern refuses to brand-proxy a safety-relevant category without independent fundamentals and returns INSUFFICIENT_EVIDENCE — the single clearest 'beat' over doing nothing.
